hero.title: Make human presence verifiable.

brandStory.title: Proof of Real-World Participation
brandStory.subtitle: Verified participation first. Behavior credit later.
brandStory.description1: JAVURO starts with real locations, real people, check-ins, reviews, and live participation records.
brandStory.description2: As participation data matures, the network can support reputation, partner settlement, and future utility.
